claims.summary: Verify current semantic retention uses a 25%-40% smooth recovery handoff, 10-second high-fill floor, and bounded entropy/context persistence.
Observe an exact high-entropy anchor at the 40% release boundary over its full stale window.
Verify Shadow influence duration and 12-tick decay are bounded separately from semantic retention and expose residual-ghost evidence.
Any density-gradient change to live semantic stale timing, lane decay, or sensory cadence remains Tier 5 pending Mike/operator approval.
